childhood.familyBackground: From Pacific Northwest timber and lumber family.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 아버지가 목재 임원이었던 태평양 북서부 목재 및 목재 가족에서.
childhood.education: University of Oregon, Forestry and Business
childhood.earlyLife: Worked in family lumber and timber business before expanding operations.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 사업을 확장하기 전 가족 목재 및 목재 사업에서 근무.

careerTimeline.event: Took leadership of family lumber company

failures.description: Housing crisis and lumber market collapse impact on operations
failures.descriptionKo: 주택 위기 및 목재 시장 붕괴가 운영에 미친 영향
failures.lesson: Cyclical industry exposure requires careful capital management
failures.lessonKo: 주기적 산업 노출은 신중한 자본 관리 필요

personalTraits.knownFor: Leadership of major Pacific Northwest timber and lumber operations
personalTraits.knownForKo: 태평양 북서부 목재 및 목재 운영의 리더십
personalTraits.controversies: Environmental criticism regarding logging practices and land management
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 벌목 관행 및 토지 관리에 관한 환경 비판
